ot_description: Repaired the local stage database that was blocking settlement generation and restored the latest backup. Made the exit settlement auto-generate when a resignation is accepted or completed, clipped the totals to the notice-period window, counted notice-period leave as paid against the full remaining balance, and fixed the back-dated-resignation window error.

standup.name: Smit Parekh
inProgress: Open PR for fix/offboarding-dropdown-ui → dev and get it reviewed/merged – ETA: Today EOD
next: Add manager notification on resignation submit (currently only HR/Admin are notified)
Verify reporting-manager data is set for existing TL/PL records so they surface correctly

tasks.name: Exit Settlement — Local Stage DB Repair & Backup Restore
tasks.body: Fixed local stage DB schema drift that blocked settlement generation, then restored the latest stage backup into the local DB
tasks.summary:
- Cleared stale target/ build artifacts causing a duplicate Flyway V112 and a 'no main class' startup failure
- Found the workflows table missing V94/V96 columns and the ac_expense_review*/it_asset_requests tables (Flyway history out of sync with the actual schema)
- Restored stage_backup_16_06 (a pg_dump CUSTOM-format archive despite the .sql name) into localhost:5432 via pg_restore --clean --create
- Verified the previously-failing settlement query runs cleanly after the restore

tasks.name: Exit Settlement — Auto-Generate on Resignation Accept/Complete
tasks.body: Settlement now auto-generates and saves when a resignation is accepted/admin-created/completed, so HR/Admin see it without clicking Generate
tasks.summary:
- Added SettlementAutoGenerateEvent and an after-commit listener (SettlementAutoGenerator)
- Published the event from accept(), adminCreate() (accepted/completed) and complete()
- Ran generation in a REQUIRES_NEW transaction so it never rolls back the resignation and reads committed data
- Verified: creating an accepted resignation auto-created the saved settlement with no manual Generate click

tasks.name: Exit Settlement — Clip Totals to Notice-Period Window
tasks.body: Settlement totals now count only working days inside the notice window instead of summing full calendar months
tasks.summary:
- Diagnosed the confusing 35 working days (full April + partial May) versus the one-month notice window
- Clipped each month to [windowStart, windowEnd]: working days counted exactly, hours/leave scaled to the in-window slice
- Verified working days 35 → 22 for the back-dated exit
- Added a UI hint in the settlement modal that figures are limited to the notice window

tasks.name: Exit Settlement — Full-Balance Paid Leave
tasks.body: Notice-period leave now counts as paid against the full remaining annual balance instead of the monthly-accrued amount
tasks.summary:
- Found paid leave being recorded as unpaid because the workflow engine splits leave by monthly accrual
- Re-split leave in the settlement layer using the full remaining balance (allocated − used), consumed chronologically across months
- Repriced payable hours to match the new paid-leave amount
- Scoped to the settlement only (payroll/workflow engine left untouched); verified paid 1 → 4.45 and unpaid → 0

tasks.name: Exit Settlement — Back-Dated Resignation Window Fix
tasks.body: Fixed the 400 'Confirmed last working day is before the acceptance date' error for HR back-dated / already-left employees
tasks.summary:
- Traced the inverted window: acceptedAt (today's wall-clock) used as the window start fell after the past last working day
- Fell back to the resignation date as the window start for back-dated exits
- Left the normal accept flow unchanged; the fix also repairs already-persisted records
- Verified generation for the completed back-dated exit (window 19 Apr → 19 May)
